predicate.title: Wire agent-usage/v2 into metrics and load token-optimization guidance
predicate.problem: agent-usage/v1's four aggregate counters cannot say where tokens went; roadmap-priority-3-token-granularity specifies a v2 predicate with five breakdown dimensions plus a feedback-loop requirement, neither yet implemented
acceptance_criteria: bindings/claude-code/usage.py emits agent-usage/v2 with by_model, by_thread, by_phase, by_tool, and turn_shape
spec/tools/metrics.py surfaces the per-model split and governance-overhead ratio, rendering n/a for pre-v2 changes in the new columns
reference-agent-token-optimization is loaded by agents working in this repo via a generated CLAUDE.md
roadmap-priority-3-token-granularity is marked done and roadmap-whats-next promotes the next NOW item
